database.title: Select database
database.description: Your account has access to several databases. Pick the one holding your meter data.

confirm.title: Confirm initial import
confirm.description: Historical consumption starting from {start} will be imported for {count} object(s): {objects}. Past months are imported as monthly totals; the current month as daily values.

error.invalid_auth: Login rejected — check username and password.

abort.no_objects: No objects found for this account.

data_description.import_heating: Disable outside the heating season; missed months are backfilled automatically when re-enabled.

sync.name: Sync
sync.description: Run the portal sync and statistics backfill immediately for all configured accounts.
